message:
Refresh verification gates and harden verifier economy tests with real Ed25519 signing

Verification Gate Refresh (Section 10.4, 6 beads):
- Re-verified bd-12q, bd-1ah, bd-1gx, bd-1vm, bd-273, bd-ml1, bd-phf
  with updated timestamps (2026-03-09) and file size increases reflecting
  recent implementation growth (quarantine.rs +10.9KB, certification.rs +9.5KB,
  reputation.rs +4.8KB, ecosystem_telemetry.rs +3.0KB)
- All beads PASS (12/12 or 13/13 checks)

Section 15 Gate (bd-2nre):
- Rust unit tests: 29 → 42 (+13 new tests)
- Python tests: 26 → 30 (+4 new tests)
- New supply chain implementation artifacts: provenance.rs, artifact_signing.rs,
  transparency_verifier.rs, revocation_registry.rs
- Gap closure: bd-3hdn CLOSED — Canonical signed-manifest admission kernel
  replaces shape-only checks (Ed25519, provenance chain, Merkle inclusion proofs)
- Capability renaming: signature_verification → ed25519_signature_verification,
  provenance_validation → provenance_chain_validation
- New capabilities: admission_kernel, transparency_proof_verification,
  admission_receipts_with_negative_witnesses

Verifier Economy Test Hardening:
- Replace dummy "sig-valid" strings with real Ed25519 cryptographic signatures
  in all staking governance integration tests (10+ test functions updated)
- New test_signing_key(seed) helper creates deterministic signing keys
- make_verifier_reg() and make_submission() now derive actual public keys and
  compute real signatures via attestation_signature_payload()
- Make attestation_signature_payload() pub(crate) for test access

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
